name: Knight Light
description: Knight Light is the Light Trap Master in Skylanders: Trap Team. He comes with the Sunscraper Spire expansion pack, but later came in a single pack.
biography: Before the destruction of the Core of Light left him stranded in the Light Realm, Knight Light was the protector of the Starlight – the source of light, wisdom and vast energy in Radiant City. But an evil villain known as Luminous wanted the Starlight for himself. Without warning, Luminous attacked, and the two took to the skies in an epic battle which lasted several days. In the end, Knight Light stood victorious and Luminous was imprisoned within Sunscraper Spire so that he could no longer pose a threat to Skylands. Now with his Traptanium blade, Knight Light fights alongside the Trap Team to keep evil at bay!
personality: Knight Light is described as pure, gallant, righteous and illuminating.

story.content: Knight Light battled against Chef Pepper Jack and his group of Plant Warriors to protect a village of Mabu. Announcing his return to the realm of Skylands, the Light Trap Master defeated the Fire Doom Raider and his minions. When Spotlight and Blackout were ambushed by Pain-Yatta's candy soldiers, Knight Light and Knight Mare came to aid their fellow allies after they contacted the two Trap Masters prior to coming to the Arkeyan ruins. During the heat of the battle, Knight Light openly blamed Knight Mare for both of them being late, and in response, Knight Mare claimed that Knight Light was the one responsible. Eventually the Light and Dark Skylanders defeated the horde of candy warriors, but were soon confronted by Pain-Yatta and became overwhelmed by his wave of candy. Knight Light, Blackout, Spotlight, and Knight Mare became imprisoned inside Pain-Yatta's giant pinata to power him and his army of candy warriors during their impending conquest over Skylands. Should they use their powers of Light and Dark to try and escape their prison, they would only make Pain-Yatta and his army stronger. Eventually the Skylanders concocted a plan to overload the pinata with their powers, causing it to explode and allowing the Skylanders to escape. Despite absorbing the Light and Dark energies to empower himself, Pain-Yatta suddenly became sick from taking in too much power and his candy warriors around Skylands dropped to pieces, resulting in Pain-Yatta's defeat. At the Skylanders Academy, Master Eon congratulated the Light and Dark Skylanders for their efforts in saving Skylands once again with their Light and Dark abilities.

As Kaos' fleet of airships breached the perimeter around the Skylanders Academy, Knight Light, Bat Spin, Scratch, Boom Jet and Sunburn aided Wash Buckler's group in fending them off. However they were shocked to see more of Kaos' army in the form of a huge fleet of ships approaching them.

content: Rise and shine! - when entering battle
Outshining the rest! - when exiting battle
Spreading my wings! - when solving puzzles
At the ready! - when switched in
Feeling stronger! - when Traptanium Scimitar glows
Unstoppable! - when he destroys a Traptanium cluster
Up and away! - when using a bounce pad
Lighting the way! - when opening a gate
Of gold and glory! - when opening a treasure chest
My future is looking bright! - when checking stats
I look rather distinguished! - when wearing a hat
Hm, a name for the ages! - when given a nickname
Let my new name be known!

trivia: Both he and Knight Mare both have the word 'knight' in their names.
Knight Light and Knight Mare both have names that play on terms that involve sleep.
His name is a play on nightlight, a small lamp that provides light in dark areas during the night.
He loosely resembles an angel or seraph.
He also slightly resembles a harpy.
Knight Light also resembles to Angemon from the Digimon franchise, both are angelic beings who wear masks that obscure half of their face only exposing their mouths.
One of his Passive abilities in Ring of Heroes creates a halo around a random ally after he is defeated, supporting that he might be one himself.
He has the highest health out of all the Trap Masters.
Despite not having a flight upgrade, Knight Light can fly by double tapping the jump button.
Knight Light is the first Skylander to have a Doom Raider mentioned in their backstory.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Knight Light's Soul Gem Preview (See the Light)
Official Skylanders Trap Team 'Knight Light' Trailer

gameplay: In Skylanders: Trap Team, Knight Light is a Light Trap Master whose gameplay centers on high-speed sword combat and area-denial. His console abilities include 'Traptanium Scimitar' for combos and 'Prismatic Pounce' which creates a Light Aura where his sword attacks deal increased damage. His upgrades allow him to slow enemies within his auras ('Hallowed Ground'), create damaging circles of light ('Light Up'), and increase aura duration. Players can choose between the 'Scimitar Slasher' path, which focuses on vertical combat and teleporting strikes, or the 'Luminary of Light' path, which enhances his leap attacks and makes his auras explosive. His Soul Gem, 'Brilliant Blade', provides a massive damage boost to his primary weapon. On the 3DS, he uses 'Bringer of Light' and 'Pacification' as starting powers, with upgrades that add teleportation and slowing effects to his leaping blows. Notably, he possesses the highest health among all Trap Masters and can fly by double-tapping the jump button.

basic.name: Traptanium Scimitar
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing the Traptanium Scimitar. Press Attack 1, Attack 1, and hold Attack 1 for a combo attack.

basic.name: Prismatic Pounce
basic.content: Press Attack 2 for a Scimitar Slash and create a Light Aura, where Sabre attacks do more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Hallowed Ground
basic_upgrades.content: Enemies in Light Auras move slower and do reduced damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Light Up
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to create a circle of light, release to levitate and damage anything near the circle.

soulgems.name: Brilliant Blade
soulgems.content: Traptanium Scimitar is upgraded to its ultimate form and does maximum damage.

abilities.name: Ascending Strike
abilities.content: Traptanium Scimitar knocks enemies into the air.

abilities.name: Speed of Light
abilities.content: While holding Attack 3, press Attack 2 to teleport the Light Up target and perform an upward strike.

abilities.name: Spinning Slash
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge up the Traptanium Scimitar and release a 360-degree attack.

abilities.name: Radiant Radius
abilities.content: Prismatic Pounce hits a larger area and Light Auras are larger as well.

abilities.name: Illumination Detonation
abilities.content: Light Auras explode before disappearing, damaging anything nearby.

abilities.name: Flash Dash
abilities.content: Press Attack 2, Attack 2 for a powerful Prismatic Pounce attack and be invulnerable while flickering.
